name: Sticky Banner
summary: A sticky top banner that slides away on scroll with close button and smooth Framer Motion animations.
detailedDescription: Sticky Banner creates a dismissible announcement bar fixed at top of viewport. The component uses useScroll hook tracking scrollY position. When scroll exceeds 40px (configurable via hideOnScroll), banner animates up (-100px y) with opacity 0. Scrolling back down brings banner back (y: 0, opacity: 1). Close button (X icon) toggles open state, hiding banner until page refresh. Initial state starts off-screen (y: -100, opacity: 0), animating in on mount. Transitions use 0.3s easeInOut. Banner has min-h-14, full width, centered content with px-4 py-1 padding. Background is transparent by default, customizable via className. The close button scales from 0 to 1 on mount, positioned absolute top-1/2 right-2. This creates non-intrusive announcement system ideal for promotions, alerts, or site-wide messages that should be visible initially then recede as users engage with content.
purpose: Allow manual close with X button
recommendations: Good fit for dashboards, admin panels, and data-dense application layouts.
Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
Combine with hero and feature sections to establish clear top-level page flow.
